description:
Operating Area: France, Italy, Corsica, Sardinia, Naples

Seiya is more than just a luxury catamaran, she is a true invitation to the Exceptional.
Exceptionally beautiful, practical, well thought-out and close to the sea.

Built by Sunreef in Poland, the Power 80 was voted Best Catamaran at the World Yachts Trophies when it was released in 2020. Since then, it has remained the benchmark for motor catamarans, dominating the market thanks to its innovative onboard layout and state-of-the-art equipment, but above all thanks to the exceptional feedback given by everyone who has stepped on board.
Offering nearly 380sqm of useful surface area for guests, we almost forget that her hull is less than 24 meters long as space is so omnipresent. Her main beam of almost 12 meters gives her an unprecedented volume, both inside where the spaces are bathed in natural light, and outside where each arrangement recalls the opulence of the yacht. Comfort, luxury and conviviality are the key words of this yacht which offers the ultimate yachting experience.

The hulls house the cabins for the 8 guests, as well as those for the crew of 4. The owner's cabin is luxurious, spacious and exclusive, notably thanks to its walk-in dressing room and its large adjacent shower room, with separate toilet. Two VIP cabins offer double beds and are also ensuite. A final cabin with modular twin beds and its bathroom completes the lower deck layout.

The heart of the boat is certainly on the main deck, in the immense living room bathed in light formed between the two hulls. It is in fact a real “living room”, where everyone passes while enjoying the boat, stopping to cook, dine, stroll, have a drink, or simply admire the cruise. The kitchen is perfectly integrated into the space, its modern and refined design allowing it to almost disappear and blend completely with the other furniture elements. The helm station reminds everyone of the very essence of the boat: adventure. It invites everyone to admire the horizon and offers the Captain the opportunity to create a real guests experience around navigation.

The best of Seiya is not found inside, quite the opposite actually. The outdoor spaces this yacht is offering are simply astonishing. The living space is extended thanks to a bay window which completely disappears into the walls of the boat. A vast terrace offering an additional dining space and a large sunbathing area invites guests to continue their journey seamlessly outside. From this terrace we access the bathing platform, which cleverly connects the two hulls with a large hydraulic platform, to provide the most comfortable access to the sea, as close as possible to the elements. Also from the aft terrace, you can access the front part of the yacht, where again, everything is designed around comfort and conviviality. This space is surprising both for its size and its proximity to the sea, which makes it the ideal place to enjoy the cruise or have an alfresco aperitif. The flybridge, worthy of a boat at least twice as long as Seiya, completes this series of superlatives. Offering a new dining area, a bar and barbecue as well as a huge sunbathing area, it is literally the Cherry on the yacht.

Having a great yacht is one thing, but it is not all that you will need to have a memorable stay at sea. The equipment you will be able to enjoy, but also and above all the crew who will accompany you are essential to the exclusivity of your stay on board. Seiya offers a perfectly balanced formula between friendliness and exclusive service. The crew, led by Captain Léo, will be able to meet each of your needs as well as being able to make themselves forgotten to allow you to experience unique moments in total privacy. Young, dynamic and highly skilled, this team of enthusiasts will be the perfect ally for your vacation and will make your stay on board memorable.
